query:
SELECT DISTINCT
                u.id AS "id!: Uuid",
                u.email AS "email!",
                u.first_name,
                u.last_name,
                u.username
            FROM notifications n
            JOIN users u ON u.id = n.user_id
            WHERE n.created_at >= $1
              AND n.created_at < $2
              AND n.dismissed_at IS NULL
              AND n.seen = FALSE
              AND NOT EXISTS (
                  SELECT 1
                  FROM notification_digest_deliveries d
                  WHERE d.notification_id = n.id
              )
            ORDER BY u.id
